message.content:
Explore the project structure at /Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol. I need:
1. The directory tree (src/ especially - components, hooks, styles, utils)
2. Read src/hooks/use_toast.ts to understand the pattern for notification hooks (HUD will follow same pattern)
3. Read src/components/toast/toast.tsx and toast.scss to understand the toast component pattern
4. Read src/styles/_tokens.scss to see existing design tokens
5. Read src/App.tsx to understand how components are wired
Give me the full contents of all these files.

content.text: I'll explore the project structure and read all the requested files for you.

input.description: Get an overview of file types in the project
